sizing_rule.note: Multi-security portfolio weighting via covariance matrix optimization. Position weights X_i derived from correlation coefficients and volatilities to minimize portfolio variance V. Author does not specify numerical optimal_f value or Kelly fraction—only the mathematical framework (formula provided). Implementer must calculate weights from historical covariance data.

source_rule_text: Position sizes in a multi-security portfolio should be calculated using covariance matrices that account for correlation coefficients between securities to minimize overall portfolio variance.
